'''鈭歜-sh-dh''' ('''bashadha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rugine|rugine]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-sh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rugine|rugine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-sh-dh
|-
! Lemma
| bashadha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bashadhithi|bashadhithi]] || [[word:bashadhiji|bashadhiji]] || [[word:bashadhishi|bashadhishi]] || [[word:bashadhi|bashadhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bashadhuthuth|bashadhuthuth]] || [[word:bashadhujuj|bashadhujuj]] || [[word:bashadhushush|bashadhushush]] || [[word:bashadh|bashadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bashadhuthu|bashadhuthu]] || [[word:bashadhuju|bashadhuju]] || [[word:bashadhushu|bashadhushu]] || [[word:bashadhu|bashadhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bashadhufuth|bashadhufuth]] || [[word:bashadhufuj|bashadhufuj]] || [[word:bashadhufush|bashadhufush]] || [[word:bashadhuf|bashadhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bashadhethe|bashadhethe]] || [[word:bashadheje|bashadheje]] || [[word:bashadheshe|bashadheshe]] || [[word:bashadhe|bashadhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bashadhothoth|bashadhothoth]] || [[word:bashadhojoj|bashadhojoj]] || [[word:bashadhoshosh|bashadhoshosh]] || [[word:bashadh|bashadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bashadhotho|bashadhotho]] || [[word:bashadhojo|bashadhojo]] || [[word:bashadhosho|bashadhosho]] || [[word:bashadho|bashadho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bashadhofoth|bashadhofoth]] || [[word:bashadhofoj|bashadhofoj]] || [[word:bashadhofosh|bashadhofosh]] || [[word:bashadhof|bashadhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bashadh忙th忙|bashadh忙th忙]] || [[word:bashadh忙j忙|bashadh忙j忙]] || [[word:bashadh忙sh忙|bashadh忙sh忙]] || [[word:bashadh忙|bashadh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bashadhathath|bashadhathath]] || [[word:bashadhajaj|bashadhajaj]] || [[word:bashadhashash|bashadhashash]] || [[word:bashadh|bashadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bashadhatha|bashadhatha]] || [[word:bashadhaja|bashadhaja]] || [[word:bashadhasha|bashadhasha]] || [[word:bashadha|bashadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bashadhafath|bashadhafath]] || [[word:bashadhafaj|bashadhafaj]] || [[word:bashadhafash|bashadhafash]] || [[word:bashadhaf|bashadhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:bashadhasha|bashadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gobashadhasha|gobashadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokibashadhasha|gokibashadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:bashadhn眉sha|bashadhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gobashadhnkn眉sha|gobashadhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokibashadhn眉sha|gokibashadhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bashadhsh毛sha|bashadhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobashadhnksh毛sha|gobashadhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibashadhsh毛sha|gokibashadhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bashadhrosha|bashadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobashadhnkrosha|gobashadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibashadhrosha|gokibashadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bashadhmusha|bashadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gobashadhnkmusha|gobashadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibashadhmusha|gokibashadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:bashadhsherasha|bashadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gobashadhnksherasha|gobashadhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokibashadhsherasha|gokibashadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:bashadhngasha|bashadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gobashadhnkngasha|gobashadhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokibashadhngasha|gokibashadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bashadhyasha|bashadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gobashadhnkyasha|gobashadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokibashadhyasha|gokibashadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:bashadhyamasha|bashadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gobashadhnkyamasha|gobashadhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokibashadhyamasha|gokibashadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:bashadhn眉sh毛sha|bashadhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobashadhnkn眉sh毛sha|gobashadhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibashadhn眉sh毛sha|gokibashadhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bashadhn眉rosha|bashadhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobashadhnkn眉rosha|gobashadhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibashadhn眉rosha|gokibashadhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bashadhn眉musha|bashadhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobashadhnkn眉musha|gobashadhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibashadhn眉musha|gokibashadhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:bashadhsh毛n眉sha|bashadhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobashadhnksh毛n眉sha|gobashadhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibashadhsh毛n眉sha|gokibashadhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bashadhsh毛rosha|bashadhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobashadhnksh毛rosha|gobashadhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibashadhsh毛rosha|gokibashadhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bashadhsh毛musha|bashadhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobashadhnksh毛musha|gobashadhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibashadhsh毛musha|gokibashadhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:bashadhron眉sha|bashadhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobashadhnkron眉sha|gobashadhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibashadhron眉sha|gokibashadhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:bashadhrosh毛sha|bashadhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobashadhnkrosh毛sha|gobashadhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibashadhrosh毛sha|gokibashadhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bashadhromusha|bashadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobashadhnkromusha|gobashadhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibashadhromusha|gokibashadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:bashadhmun眉sha|bashadhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobashadhnkmun眉sha|gobashadhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibashadhmun眉sha|gokibashadhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:bashadhmush毛sha|bashadhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobashadhnkmush毛sha|gobashadhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibashadhmush毛sha|gokibashadhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bashadhmurosha|bashadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobashadhnkmurosha|gobashadhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibashadhmurosha|gokibashadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:bashadh|bashadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:b忙sh忙dh|b忙sh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hobashadh|hobashadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hob忙sh忙dh|hob忙sh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobashadh|hohobashadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohob忙sh忙dh|hohob忙sh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉bashadh|n眉bashadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉b忙sh忙dh|n眉b忙sh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉bashadh|n眉n眉bashadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉b忙sh忙dh|n眉n眉b忙sh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂bashadh|n茂bashadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂b忙sh忙dh|n茂b忙sh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂bashadh|n茂n茂bashadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂b忙sh忙dh|n茂n茂b忙sh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lubashadh|lubashadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lub忙sh忙dh|lub忙sh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubashadh|lulubashadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulub忙sh忙dh|lulub忙sh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:libashadh|libashadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lib忙sh忙dh|lib忙sh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibashadh|lilibashadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilib忙sh忙dh|lilib忙sh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kobashadh|kobashadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kob忙sh忙dh|kob忙sh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobashadh|kokobashadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokob忙sh忙dh|kokob忙sh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kebashadh|kebashadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keb忙sh忙dh|keb忙sh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebashadh|kekebashadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeb忙sh忙dh|kekeb忙sh忙dh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
